title: Low Shield
description: This resource pack lowers the shield when hold, providing more space on screen.
body:
## 🎯About
**Low Shield** is a simple, performance-friendly resource pack that reduces the size of the in-game shield to improve visibility during combat and exploration.

The default shield can block a large portion of your screen, especially in tight situations. This pack minimizes its footprint while keeping the original look and feel intact, giving you a clearer field of view without changing gameplay mechanics.

## 🛠️ Features

- Smaller shield model for better screen visibility
- Vanilla-style design — no unnecessary visual changes
- Ideal for PvP, survival, and general gameplay
- Lightweight and fully client-side

## 📦 Compatibility

Compatible with other packs (as long as they don’t modify the shield model)


If you want a cleaner, less obstructed view without removing the shield entirely, Low Shield is a practical upgrade.

## ⚠️IMPORTANT
If you are using this resource pack in versions older than 1.20.5 then you might see the error that resource pack is not compatiable, but you can try using it.

Testing for this resource pack is done till 1.20.5 version.
